## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows convention (`<type>(<scope>): <message>` or `<type>: <message>`)
- [ ] Tests were run locally (or not applicable)
- [ ] No breaking changes, or breaking changes are documented
- [ ] Related docs/config were updated if needed
